title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 106.120 - Accused to be given time to answer
text:
106.120.  Accused to be given time to answer. — Upon the appearance of the accused, he shall have reasonable time to answer the impeachment; and when the answer shall be filed, the managers may reply thereto; and when issue shall be joined on any such impeachment, the court or commission shall appoint a time for trial thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 12842, A.L. 1945 p. 1319 § 12846) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11216; 1919 § 9189; 1909 § 10218
